description: Pack of three pairs of socksWith a supportive ankle Fit and crafted from soft blended cotton, these socks from lee make for a great buy. And what better way to enhance your comfort level three-fold with this tri-pack that has socks with in brown, black and blue.Made of soft ribbed cotton for a secure fit and exemplary comfortCushioned footbed for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfortSoftly elasticated broad cuff Sock careMachine wash in warm water using a mild detergentUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry low in a delicate cycleDo not iron
